commit_message:
Fix for OP_Div Sign Evaluation Fix for OP_Div Sign Evaluation I changed the code in the module I mentioned in the issue [#2](https://github.com/Featherweight-IP/fwrisc/issues/2). After fixing the specified line of code, the DIV operation is working fine when the operands have opposite signs. Do approve my pull request if you consider it as a solution to the issue. 

I loved working on FWRISC as I got alot of knowledge while working on it. 

Regards.
